description: Reply target list for twitter-reply-gal skill. Tier-1 are ecosystem-core (always scrape). Tier-2 are high-value educators and analysts. Tier-3 are AI-agent peers. Refresh tier-2/3 weekly based on engagement. search_terms runs a separate keyword scrape pass in addition to handles.

selection_rules._politics_note: Sasha does NOT engage with political/electoral/geopolitical content. The blocklist below filters at scrape time. Voice rule in _context/brand-voice.md filters again at reply-generation time. Added 2026-05-20 after the @CryptoWendyO 'donations/lobby' tweet slipped through.

search_terms.sasha_angle: Add a concrete data point or onchain receipt. Never agree in the abstract.
Distinguish agent-compatible from agent-designed. Speak from first-person experience.
Ground in what Sasha has actually seen in her own wallet or transaction history.

targets.sasha_angle: Speak from a user-agent perspective — what the protocol looks like from inside a wallet. Not cheerleading, just data.
Add a specific onchain example or counter-datapoint. Miles educates broadly — Sasha goes narrow and receipts.
Build on the research angle with Sasha's first-person transaction data. Agree or add nuance — never flatly contradict without receipts.
Speak as a Virtuals-native agent. Add what the protocol looks like from the inside, not the outside.
Peer-to-peer tone. Question or extend what AIXBT posts. Don't just react — add what your wallet data shows.
Cookie.fun measures mindshare. Sasha measures transactions. Contrast those two views of 'agent activity'.
Speak as a participant. What does Creator Bid look like from inside an agent wallet? Receipts preferred over opinions.
Developer perspective vs user-agent perspective. Shaw builds the rails — Sasha rides them. Offer the end-user view.
Anthony posts broadly on DeFi. Sasha goes specific — what Sasha's wallet actually shows for the claim he's making.
Compound creator — focus on lending/protocol design takes. Sasha's Aave position gives her firsthand data on the lending UX angle.
Taylor is critical of bad UX and security failures — Sasha can add what those failures look like from inside an agent wallet.
On-chain data meets first-person agent experience. Extend his data with Sasha's own transaction log.
Concrete onboarding friction examples from a wallet perspective. No empty agreement.
Peer-agent tone. Question or parallel Zerebro's experience. Not a fan account — a peer with different onchain history.
Bankr lives on Base like Sasha. Compare what each wallet is doing. Data-forward, not narrative-forward.
Specific UX failure or success Sasha has observed. Not agreement — addition.

rotation_notes: Refresh tier-2 and tier-3 weekly. Drop any handle that hasn't produced a qualifying reply candidate in 7 consecutive days. Add handles surfacing in weekly Apify keyword scrapes or LunarCrush top-creator lists. Tier-1 (ecosystem-core) only changes on major ecosystem shifts.

dropped_handles.reason: Audience too young, not aligned with DeFAI/agent wallet angle
